original_query: select  i_brand_id brand_id, i_brand brand, i_manufact_id, i_manufact,  	sum(ss_ext_sales_price) ext_price   from date_dim, store_sales, item,customer,customer_address,store   where  d_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk     and ss_item_sk = i_item_sk     and ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk     and c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk     and ss_store_sk = s_store_sk     AND i_category  = 'Home'     and d_year=2002     and d_moy = 8     and substring(ca_zip,1,5) <> substring(s_zip,1,5)     and ca_state  = 'GA'     and c_birth_month = 4     and ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100  group by i_brand       ,i_brand_id       ,i_manufact_id       ,i_manufact  order by ext_price desc          ,i_brand          ,i_brand_id          ,i_manufact_id          ,i_manufact limit 100 ;
rewritten_query:
SELECT 
    i_brand_id AS brand_id, 
    i_brand AS brand, 
    i_manufact_id, 
    i_manufact, 
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS ext_price   
FROM 
    date_dim
    JOIN store_sales ON date_dim.d_date_sk = store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk
    JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk AND item.i_category = 'Home'
    JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk AND customer.c_birth_month = 4
    JOIN (
        SELECT ca_address_sk, LEFT(ca_zip, 5) AS ca_zip_prefix
        FROM customer_address
        WHERE ca_state = 'GA'
    ) AS ca ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
    JOIN (
        SELECT s_store_sk, LEFT(s_zip, 5) AS s_zip_prefix
        FROM store
    ) AS s ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2002
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 8
    AND ca.ca_zip_prefix <> s.s_zip_prefix
    AND store_sales.ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100
GROUP BY 
    i_brand, 
    i_brand_id, 
    i_manufact_id, 
    i_manufact 
ORDER BY 
    ext_price DESC, 
    i_brand, 
    i_brand_id, 
    i_manufact_id, 
    i_manufact 
LIMIT 100;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Used derived tables to precompute zip prefixes (LEFT(ca_zip,5) and LEFT(s_zip,5)) to avoid repeated substring calculations during joins.
Simplified join conditions by replacing substring comparisons with direct column comparisons of precomputed values.
Moved the ca_state='GA' filter into the customer_address derived table for early filtering.
